title: Add class declarations, constructors, and instance member access
goal: Implement the initial class/object model: `class`, `init`, instance fields, methods, construction, and `@` access inside methods.
context: A class can define `init` and methods using the design document syntax.
steps: Add lexer/parser/AST support for `class` declarations and class method bodies.
Add checker support for class naming, duplicate method/member diagnostics, and method arity basics.
Implement interpreter support for construction like `User("komagata")`, `init`, fields, methods, and `@field` inside methods.
Add generated-C support for a minimal class subset or explicitly gate unsupported C paths with tests and docs if full C support needs follow-up.
Add examples covering a simple class, constructor, property read, and method call.
done_when: A simple `class User` example runs through the interpreter.
Class names and duplicate methods are checked.
C emission behavior for the implemented subset is tested or explicitly documented as pending.
